anyPaymentsMade.label: cy Has the defendant paid any money to {{claimantName}} since {{claimIssueDate}}?

paymentDetails.label: cy Give details about how much the defendant paid and when

repaymentPlanAgreed.label: cy Has the defendant come to any agreement with {{claimantName}} to repay the arrears since {{claimIssueDate}}?

repaymentAgreedDetails.label: cy Give details about how much the defendant has agreed to pay, how often the defendant will pay and when the agreement was made

repayArrearsInstalments.label: cy Would the defendant like to offer to pay off their arrears in instalments?
repayArrearsInstalments.changeHidden: cy offer to pay in instalments

installmentAmount.label: cy How much could the defendant afford to pay in addition to the current rent?

installmentFrequency.label: cy How frequently could the defendant afford to pay this amount?
